---
title: "Welcome To STATS10"
subtitle: "Introduction to Statistical Reasoning"
description: "Below are links used in this course"
image: stats.png
about:
  template: trestles
  links:
    - text: Zoom
      url: "https://ucla.zoom.us/j/4285433918?pwd=TVpIRndYYmZSeTg0NUUvYlhTWllUQT09"
      icon: camera-video
    - text: Email
      url: "mailto:toledo60@g.ucla.edu"
      icon: inbox-fill
    - text: Box
      url: "https://app.box.com/s/ya2efsp646p282ekcdaqeaofjvlnp6xj"
      icon: bi-cloud
comments: false
---


## Class Overview

**Instructor:** Jose Toledo Luna <br/>

**Discussion**: Thursday 4:00pm - 4:50pm @ PAB 1749<br/>
**Office Hours**: Thursday 1:00pm - 1:50pm @ MS 8349 or [Zoom](https://ucla.zoom.us/j/4285433918?pwd=TVpIRndYYmZSeTg0NUUvYlhTWllUQT09) <br/>


**Material**: Please use the [Box Folder](https://app.box.com/s/ya2efsp646p282ekcdaqeaofjvlnp6xj) to access the lab material for this course. All other material regarding STATS 10 can be found on BruinLearn


## Discussions

```{r}
#| echo: false
titles <- c("")
links <- c("")

df <- tibble::tibble(
  Discussion = paste("Week", 1:5),
  Notes = ifelse(
    links == "",
    titles,
    paste0('<a href="', links, '" class="course-link">', titles, "</a>")
  )
)
```

```{r}
#| echo: false
knitr::kable(
  df,
  format = "html",
  align = c("l", "l"),
  escape = FALSE,
  table.attr = 'class="courses-table glass-table"'
) |>
  kableExtra::kable_styling(
    full_width = TRUE,
    bootstrap_options = NULL,
    position = "left"
  ) |>
  kableExtra::column_spec(1, width = "13em") |>
  kableExtra::column_spec(2, width = "87%")
```
